name: components/skeleton
description: A placeholder loading state that mimics the shape of upcoming content to reduce perceived latency. Uses Kobalte Skeleton under the hood with a configurable corner radius, animated pulse effect, and an after-element overlay that applies the muted background. Automatically activates when data is pending and is fully themeable via CSS data attributes.
useCases: Card and list placeholders while fetching dashboard metrics or feed items
Table row skeletons to indicate that paginated data is being loaded
Avatar and text-line skeletons inside user-profile headers during initial load
Form skeletons for SSR or slow connections so the layout does not jump on hydration
